case_title: SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. PAR 70, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY,

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAR 70, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND CORY LOVELL $3,036.74 PRINCIPAL, $312.99 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,574.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION SERVED OCT-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAR 70, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND CORY LOVELL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON NOV-21-2014 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAR 70, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND CORY LOVELL

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT PAR 70, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND CORY LOVELL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $276.18 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 15084016) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRIVER OWNERS ASSOCIATION
